name: 数学 EE 要点
subject: ee
domain_name: 学科差异 / Subject-Specific Tips / Subject-Specific
curriculum_points: Students undertaking a Mathematics EE will engage in the exploration of a specific mathematical topic, demonstrating rigorous and precise mathematical reasoning and communication.
The essay may involve applying mathematics to solve a problem, proving theorems, or analyzing mathematical models, with a clear emphasis on the beauty and utility of mathematics itself.
